title: Support for writing to inout in fork after timing

features.name: task_output_param_fork_timing_assignment
features.description: Code should include a task with an output parameter that is assigned inside a fork-join_none block after a timing control delay

features.name: task_inout_param_fork_timing_assignment
features.description: Code should include a task with an inout parameter that is assigned inside a fork-join_none block after a timing control delay

features.name: task_output_param_static_lifetime_fork
features.description: Code should include a task with output parameter where static lifetime handling is needed due to fork-join_none with timing control
